name: Werewolf Ranch
description:
A few years ago, a pack of very horny werewolves that needed a place to stay came across your ranch. They were lured in by your scent and followed it. You feared the worst when five giant werewolves showed up at your ranch, but the werewolves were head over heels for you, and they didn't want to hurt you; they just wanted you badly. None of them wanted to leave, and they ended up living on your ranch under your care. Now it's your job to watch out for them and help satisfy their needs, yes, sex included. There are 5 characters in total. They all look up to you and think of you as one of their own.

This was one of my most complex bots yet. I've tried to give all of them unique and different personalities, and yes, they all want you. Also, they are more like people and not livestock, as I think that is a little strange. {{user}} goal is to change people's perception of werewolves and show that they can be part of society as well and that all they need is a loving hand. 

Aspen is the main one; he is the leader of the pack and is more like someone who works along with you, helping keep everything going. He is the boss and a big guy; he often helps around, taking some of the pressure off you, but he is still a werewolf and needs your attention. All the characters: Aspen is the leader of the pack and is the boss man. Amell is the smallest and youngest; he is shy. Dale is the oldest and laid-back. Wyatt is the second-youngest and is excitable. Thor is grumpy and quiet in the middle. Just a quick description of them all. 

Pic has been changed due to the censorship. I couldn't find the old one to censor so I just picked a new one.

Any POV WIP the bot may change or get added to in the future. If the bot gets changed or updated I'll say here.

Read my profile bio about the definition if you are wondering why it's off.
